sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(100), salary DOUBLE);
SELECT id, name, salary, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY salary) AS salary_rank FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, name, salary, percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY salary > 60000 ORDER BY name) AS rank_above_60k FROM employees;
